CVE-2023-51792.title: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in libde265 v1.0.12 allows a local  ...
CVE-2023-51792.description: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in libde265 v1.0.12 allows a local attacker to cause a denial of service via the allocation size exceeding the maximum supported size of 0x10000000000.
CVE-2023-51792.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2024-38950.title: Heap Buffer Overflow vulnerability in Libde265 v1.0.15 allows att ...
CVE-2024-38950.description: Heap Buffer Overflow vulnerability in Libde265 v1.0.15 allows attackers to crash the application via crafted payload to __interceptor_memcpy function.

CVE-2024-38949.description: Heap Buffer Overflow vulnerability in Libde265 v1.0.15 allows attackers to crash the application via crafted payload to display444as420 function at sdl.cc
